step_rationale: Anchor: oxLDL macrophage receptor mediating foam cell formation; plaque inflammation.
mechanism: Macrophage scavenger receptor recognizing oxidized and modified lipoproteins, driving foam cell formation and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Acrolein-conjugated low-density lipoprotein induces macrophage foam cell formation.
Scavenger receptor A index and coronary thrombus in patients with acute ST elevation myocardial infarction.
Circulating oxidized LDL: a biomarker and a pathogenic factor.
